SAM.Name: 2K11 Krug (Circle)
SAM.Note: Fire Control Radar wrong in Falcon, should be Pat Hand

SAM.Name: 2K11M2 Krug-M1 (Circle)
SAM.Note: Each battery typically consists of two 9M8M1 missiles and four 9M8M2 missiles

SAM.Name: 4K33 Osa-M (Wasp)
SAM.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

SAM.Name: 9K31 Strela-1
SAM.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

SAM.Name: 9K31M Strela-1M
SAM.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

SAM.Name: 9K33 Osa (Wasp)
SAM.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

SAM.Name: 9K33M2 Osa-AK (Wasp)
SAM.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

SAM.Name: 9K33M3 Osa-AKM (Wasp)
SAM.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

SAM.Name: 9K34 Strela-3
SAM.InFalcon: Airb-AK47 / T Art-2A65 / SA-11 / SA-17 / SOps-AK47

SAM.Name: 9K35 Strela-10SV
SAM.Type: Short range low alt Mobile SAM
SAM.FireControlRadar: Snap Shot on every vehicle, Hat Box, Flat Box B
SAM.FireOnMove: Snap Shot on every vehicle, Hat Box, Flat Box B

SAM.Name: 9K35M Strela-10M
SAM.Type: Short range low alt Mobile SAM
SAM.FireControlRadar: Snap Shot on every vehicle, Hat Box, Flat Box B
SAM.FireOnMove: Snap Shot on every vehicle, Hat Box, Flat Box B

SAM.Name: 9K35M2 Strela-10M2
SAM.Type: Short range low alt Mobile SAM
SAM.Guidance: Photo contrast or dual IR homing
SAM.FireControlRadar: Snap Shot on every vehicle, Hat Box, Flat Box B
SAM.FireOnMove: Snap Shot on every vehicle, Hat Box, Flat Box B

SAM.Name: 9K35M3 Strela-10M3
SAM.Type: Short range low alt Mobile SAM
SAM.Guidance: Photo conthree channel seeker, 1 infrared, 2 visible band television contrast, 3 passive homing
SAM.Note: Improved 9Sh127 optical sighting system for the gunner with WFOV and NFOV modes.

SAM.Name: Crotale 1000 (Rattlesnake)
SAM.Guidance: Command CLOS or optical direction finding
SAM.SearchRadar: E-band pulse-Doppler surveillance and Acq radar on ACU
SAM.FireControlRadar: Thomson-CSF, Mirador IV, J-band monopulse tracking radar
SAM.Note: TELARS and ACU are linked by cables.

SAM.Name: Crotale 2000 (Rattlesnake)
SAM.Guidance: Command CLOS or optical direction finding
SAM.SearchRadar: E-band pulse-Doppler surveillance and Acq radar on ACU
SAM.FireControlRadar: Thomson-CSF, Mirador IV, J-band monopulse tracking radar
SAM.Note: Additional television channel

SAM.Name: Crotale 3000 (Rattlesnake)
SAM.Guidance: Command CLOS or optical direction finding
SAM.SearchRadar: E-band pulse-Doppler surveillance and Acq radar on ACU
SAM.FireControlRadar: Thomson-CSF, Mirador IV, J-band monopulse tracking radar
SAM.Note: Further enhanced tracking capability by an added automatic television track capability.

SAM.Name: Crotale 4000 (Rattlesnake)
SAM.Guidance: Command CLOS or optical direction finding
SAM.SearchRadar: E-band pulse-Doppler surveillance and Acq radar on ACU
SAM.Note: Cable interconnections between units were replace by radio datalink.

SAM.Name: Crotale 5000 (Rattlesnake)
SAM.Guidance: Command CLOS or optical direction finding
SAM.SearchRadar: E-band pulse-Doppler surveillance and Acq radar on ACU
SAM.Note: Has improved radar with detection range of 18 km.

SAM.Name: Crotale Mk.3 (Rattlesnake)
SAM.Guidance: Command CLOS or optical direction finding
SAM.Note: Missile has been improved. The system has new surveillance radar.

SAM.Name: Crotale NG (Rattlesnake)
SAM.Guidance: Command CLOS or optical direction finding
SAM.SearchRadar: E-band pulse-Doppler surveillance and Acq radar on ACU
SAM.Note: Has improved radar with detection range of 18 km.

SAM.Name: FIM-92B Stinger POST
SAM.Note: Passive Optical Seeker Technique (POST), improved Stinger with a new seeker

SAM.Name: FIM-92C Stinger RMD
SAM.Note: Reprogrammable Microprocessor (RMP), allowing for incremental firmware updates

SAM.Name: FIM-92E Stinger Block I
SAM.Note: Improving the missile's performance against low-signature targets

SAM.Name: FIM-92F Stinger Block II
SAM.Note: Improve the missile's effectiveness in "high clutter"

SAM.Name: FT2000
SAM.FireControlRadar: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird
SAM.FireOnMove: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird

SAM.Name: GWS-25 Sea Wolf
SAM.Note: Conventionally Launched Sea Wolf (CLSW)

SAM.Name: GWS-26 Sea Wolf
SAM.Note: GWS-26 Vertically Launched Sea Wolf (VLSW)

SAM.Name: HQ-10
SAM.FireControlRadar: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird
SAM.FireOnMove: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird

SAM.Name: HQ-15
SAM.FireControlRadar: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird
SAM.FireOnMove: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird

SAM.Name: HQ-18
SAM.Guidance: Combined inertial with semi active self guidance
SAM.FireControlRadar: Grill Pan, Bill Board, High Screen
SAM.FireOnMove: Grill Pan, Bill Board, High Screen

SAM.Name: HQ-9
SAM.FireControlRadar: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird
SAM.FireOnMove: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird

SAM.Name: Javelin S-15
SAM.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

SAM.Name: M-1 Volna
SAM.Note: 2 targets can be engaged if the ship has 2 systems

SAM.Name: M-1M Volna-M
SAM.Note: 2 targets can be engaged if the ship has 2 systems

SAM.Name: MIM-104A Patriot
SAM.Type: "Phased Array Tracking Radar to Intercept On Target"
SAM.Note: Basic Capability vs. Aircraft. Limited Effectiveness/Lethality vs. Scud-Class TBMs And SOJ ECM Threats

SAM.Name: MIM-104B Patriot PAC-1
SAM.Type: "Phased Array Tracking Radar to Intercept On Target"

SAM.Name: MIM-104C Patriot PAC-2
SAM.Type: "Phased Array Tracking Radar to Intercept On Target"

SAM.Name: MIM-104F Patriot PAC-3
SAM.Type: "Phased Array Tracking Radar to Intercept On Target"

SAM.Name: MIM-115 Roland 2
SAM.Guidance: Continuous wave beacon to allow automatic radar tracking

SAM.Name: MIM-14B Nike Hercules B
SAM.Note: Nike deactivated, USA - 1983, Europe counrties - 1988

SAM.Name: MIM-14C Nike Hercules C
SAM.Note: Nike deactivated, USA - 1983, Europe counrties - 1988

SAM.Name: MIM-23B I-Hawk
SAM.MinRange: 1.5km / 5000ft at High Alt, 2.5km / 8200ft at Low Alt
SAM.MaxRange: 40km / 25.0nm at High Alt, 20km / 12.4nm as Low Alt

SAM.Name: MIM-23C I-Hawk PIP Phase I
SAM.MinRange: 1.5km / 5000ft at High Alt, 2.5km / 8200ft at Low Alt
SAM.MaxRange: 40km / 25.0nm at High Alt, 20km / 12.4nm as Low Alt
SAM.Note: Improved ECCM capabilities

SAM.Name: MIM-23C/D I-Hawk PIP Phase II
SAM.MinRange: 1.5km / 5000ft at High Alt, 2.5km / 8200ft at Low Alt
SAM.MaxRange: 40km / 25.0nm at High Alt, 20km / 12.4nm as Low Alt
SAM.Note: Improved ECCM capabilities

SAM.Name: MIM-23E/F I-Hawk PIP Phase III
SAM.MinRange: 1.5km / 5000ft at High Alt, 2.5km / 8200ft at Low Alt
SAM.MaxRange: 40km / 25.0nm at High Alt, 20km / 12.4nm as Low Alt
SAM.Note: Counter saturation attacks by simultaneously intercepting multiple low-level targets

SAM.Name: MIM-72A Chaparral
SAM.Launcher: M54 Launching Station atop the M730 carrier
SAM.Note: Chaparral is a type of roadrunner bird

SAM.Name: MIM-72C Chaparral
SAM.Launcher: M54 Launching Station atop the M730 carrier
SAM.Note: Chaparral is a type of roadrunner bird

SAM.Name: MIM-72E Chaparral
SAM.Launcher: M54 Launching Station atop the M730 carrier
SAM.Note: Chaparral is a type of roadrunner bird

SAM.Name: MIM-72G Chaparral
SAM.Launcher: M54 Launching Station atop the M730 carrier
SAM.Note: Chaparral is a type of roadrunner bird

SAM.Name: Rapier / Field Standard A
SAM.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

SAM.Name: Rapier / Field Standard B1
SAM.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)
SAM.Previous: Field Standard A / Field Standard B
SAM.Note: the search radar was upgraded to be easily shut down in case of an anti-radiation missile attack. FSB included lessons from the Falklands campaign, notable the 'pointing stick' that enabled the detachment commander of a fire unit to point the aiming unit at a target."

SAM.Name: Rapier Darkfire / Field Standard B2
SAM.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)
SAM.Note: Thermal imaging device

SAM.Name: Rapier Field Standard C / 2000
SAM.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

SAM.Name: Rapier SP Mk.lA
SAM.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

SAM.Name: Rapier SP Mk.lB
SAM.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

SAM.Name: Roland 1
SAM.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

SAM.Name: Roland 2
SAM.Guidance: Continuous wave beacon to allow automatic radar tracking

SAM.Name: S-125 Neva
SAM.Note: Only 2 missiles on a mobile unit, 4 on a fixed unit

SAM.Name: S-125M Neva-M
SAM.Note: Only 2 missiles on a mobile unit, 4 on a fixed unit

SAM.Name: S-125M1 Neva-M1
SAM.Note: Only 2 missiles on a mobile unit, 4 on a fixed unit

SAM.Name: S-200 Vega
SAM.Type: Long range for medium to high targets
SAM.SearchRadar: Tall King, Big Back, Back Net, Back Trap

SAM.Name: S-200A Angara
SAM.Type: Long range for medium to high targets
SAM.SearchRadar: Tall King, Big Back, Back Net, Back Trap

SAM.Name: S-200D Dubna
SAM.Type: Long range for medium to high targets
SAM.SearchRadar: Tall King, Big Back, Back Net, Back Trap
SAM.Note: N denotes the Nuclear warhead

SAM.Name: S-200M Vega-M
SAM.Type: Long range for medium to high targets
SAM.SearchRadar: Tall King, Big Back, Back Net, Back Trap
SAM.Note: N denotes the Nuclear warhead

SAM.Name: S-200V Vega
SAM.Type: Long range for medium to high targets
SAM.SearchRadar: Tall King, Big Back, Back Net, Back Trap

SAM.Name: S-200VE Vega-E
SAM.Type: Long range for medium to high targets
SAM.SearchRadar: Tall King, Big Back, Back Net, Back Trap
SAM.Note: Export version

SAM.Name: S-25 Berkut (Golden Eagle)
SAM.Note: It was used only to defend Moscow

SAM.Name: S-300P / S-300PT
SAM.Note: P = podvizhnyi, Russian for mobile

SAM.Name: S-300PMU / S-300PT-1A
SAM.Note: U = usovershtsvovanniy or 'improved'

SAM.Name: S-300V (9M82)
SAM.Guidance: Combined inertial with semi active self guidance

SAM.Name: S-300V (9M83)
SAM.Guidance: Combined inertial with semi active self guidance

SAM.Name: S-75
SAM.Note: Improved aircraft counter measures led to the development of the Fan Song-E with its better antennas which could cut through heavy jamming.

SAM.Name: S-75M Volkhov (Volkhov River)
SAM.Note: Improved aircraft counter measures led to the development of the Fan Song-E with its better antennas which could cut through heavy jamming.

SAM.Name: S-75M2 Volkhov (Volkhov River)
SAM.Note: shipments to Vietnam started in late 1970

SAM.Name: SA-75N Desna (Desna River)
SAM.Note: Shot Down Gary Powers U2

SAM.Name: Tayir as Sabah
SAM.FireControlRadar: Fan Song-B, Spoon Rest, Flat Face, Side Net
SAM.FireOnMove: Fan Song-B, Spoon Rest, Flat Face, Side Net
